headline: Verified profiles help sources find the right tip line
subtext: The public directory makes verified accounts easier to spot before someone starts an anonymous submission.
image_alt_text: Social post image with the headline 'Verified profiles help sources find the right tip line' and subtext about spotting verified accounts before starting an anonymous submission, paired with a light-theme desktop view of Hush Line's public directory showing verified recipient listings.

social.bluesky: Before sending a tip, people need to know they found the right recipient. Hush Line's public directory makes verified accounts easier to spot.
social.linkedin: Before someone sends an anonymous tip, they need to know they reached the right person. Hush Line's public directory makes verified accounts easier to spot, so sources can choose a recipient with more confidence before they submit.
social.mastodon: If you are deciding where to send a tip, trust comes first. Hush Line's public directory makes verified accounts easier to spot so you can check who you're contacting before you share anything.

rationale: This uses the freshest guest-facing screenshot work from the latest release and highlights a core Hush Line need from the docs: helping sources verify that they are contacting the right journalist, lawyer, or other trusted recipient before starting an anonymous disclosure.
copy_brief: Write for sources and public users evaluating or using Hush Line.

matched_pull_requests.title: Fix guest profile screenshot manifest reset logic

title: Directory - Verified
